response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (31%) exceeds our minimum threshold (15%), but cluster is islanded with critical peer r0c0 at 11.5%—all outbound sharing suspended to preserve survival margin; aggregator emergency supply is the only viable channel.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.31 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=['r1c1', 'r3c3'].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster total collapse; r0c0 at critical 11.5% SoC (~13 min autonomy). All peer-to-peer channels exhausted and r0c0 on multiple distrusted_peers lists. Zero outbound enforced to preserve survival margin. Aggregator emergency supply injection mandatory. Resume sharing only after SoC > 0.60 and grid stability confirmed..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
